changes.content: Optimized compatibility: Sender input component previously used defineModel syntax which is only available in Vue 3.4+. Now changed to lower version syntax (seamless replacement, no changes needed)

Updated development documentation in guide docs, focusing on development commands, contributing code, and local debugging workflow. Standardized development and PR submission
Improved Chinese/English documentation content
Added documentation changelog module
Integrated ESLint 9.x and Oxlint to standardize development process
Added build configuration: automatically export full/on-demand components based on component file names
Fixed missing publish content

changes.author: Json_Lee

changes.content: Typography component: Deprecated speed property, changed to step property (aligned with ant-design-x)
Typography component: Deprecated typedjs implementation for typing effect, streaming output disabled, and streaming output causes component re-rendering each time
Typography component: Deprecated step property, changed to speed property to control typing speed
Updated documentation online address and demo address
changes.author: 何嘉悦

changes.content: Removed map files from npm
changes.author: Json_Lee

changes.content: Updated CI
changes.author: Json_Lee

changes.content: Fixed CI
changes.author: Json_Lee

changes.content: Bubble component: When not customizing content slots, automatically inherits and supports fog effect properties
Fixed BubbleList component auto-scroll failure issue under streaming interface output. And decoupled BubbleList component from typewriter component
Fixed BubbleList generic bug
changes.author: Json_Lee

changes.content: Bubble component: Deprecated typing.speed property, changed to typing.step (aligned with ant-design-x)
Bubble component: Added interrupt output (pause), continue typing (resume) and destroy instance methods
Bubble component: Added operation monitoring events
Bubble component: Deprecated typing.step property, changed to typing.speed to control typing speed
Bubble component: Added avatar-size and avatar-gap properties to control bubble styles when no avatar is present
Fixed BubbleList component losing auto-scroll issue after clearing array and adding new bubbles
BubbleList component: Added back to bottom button, and scrollbar appears on hover content area. Enhanced interaction experience
Fixed BubbleList component maxWidth failure issue
Fixed BubbleList component auto-scroll failure issue under streaming interface output. And decoupled BubbleList component from typewriter component
BubbleList component: Added trigger-indices property for monitoring specified bubble @complete callbacks
Fixed Thinking component expand/collapse animation stuttering bug
Fixed Thinking SCSS issue 1.1.3
changes.author: 何嘉悦

changes.content: Fixed Thinking SCSS issue
changes.author: 何嘉悦

changes.content: Added Thinking component for displaying thinking process under streaming interface output
Added ThoughtChain component for displaying thinking process under streaming interface output
Added Welcome component for users to quickly integrate beautiful welcome introduction cards
Added Prompts component for displaying a set of predefined questions or suggestions related to the current context

Added Conversations conversation management component. Supports grouped display, menu interaction, scroll loading, custom styling and other features. Suitable for message lists, file management, task grouping and other scenarios
Added FilesCard file card component, supporting visual presentation of multiple file types (images, documents, compressed packages, etc.)
Added Attachments attachment upload component, supporting file list display, upload, drag interaction, scroll browsing and other features
Added useRecord, useSend, useXStream hook functions and XRequest utility class
changes.author: 何嘉悦

changes.content: Added useRecord hook function, solving the issue when users want to customize Sender input component's #action-list slot while also retaining the component's built-in browser speech recognition API method
Added useXStream hook function for SSE protocol streaming requests, automatically gets streaming data; supports starting and interrupting streaming requests
Added useSend hook function, can be used alone: pass in start and end methods, returns loading state. More low-level, flexible control
Updated XRequest send method
changes.author: Json_Lee

changes.content: Added XRequest utility class for SSE protocol streaming requests, configure interface base address, use send to send requests, instance has many state listeners for this request
[feat](XSender): Configuration property documentation
changes.author: jianfv

changes.content: Fixed Sender, MentionSender footer slot click auto-focus issue
Sender component: Added variants, footer, command trigger functionality
New MentionSender component, another command way of the Sender component
Sender component: Added input-style property for developers to customize built-in input box styles
Sender component: Optimized send button state to disabled when there's no value, @submit method will also be disabled. Added submit-btn-disabled property for developers to actively control
Sender input component: Two-way binding syntax change. Changed from previous v-model:value to direct v-model binding
Fixed Sender input component v-model two-way binding failure issue
Fixed Sender input component in loading state still able to trigger @submit method bug
Fixed Sender input component in read-only state still able to trigger value modification bug
Sender component: Added @recording-change event to monitor built-in recording button click state
Sender component: Added start recording (startRecording) and stop recording (stopRecording) instance methods
Fixed Sender input component autosize property failure bug
